splash.c(3) Library Functions Manual splash.c(3)

NAME

splash.c - Intro and status screen display implementation with animated rainbow effects.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct splash_header_ctx_t
Context data for splash header rendering.

Macros


#define ASCII_LOGO_LINES 7
#define ASCII_LOGO_WIDTH 36
#define RAINBOW_COLOR_COUNT 7

Functions


void splash_log_init (void)
Initialize log buffer for splash animation. void splash_log_destroy (void)
Destroy splash log buffer. void splash_log_clear (void)
Clear splash log buffer. bool splash_should_display (bool is_intro)
Check if splash screen should display. int splash_intro_start (session_display_ctx_t *ctx)
Start animated intro screen with rainbow ASCII art (non-blocking). int splash_intro_done (void)
Signal that intro splash should end (first frame ready to render). void splash_restore_stderr (void)
Restore stderr after splash animation completes. void splash_clear_display_context (void)
Clear the cached display context to prevent use-after-free. bool splash_is_running (void)
Check if splash screen animation is currently running. void splash_wait_for_animation (void)
Wait for splash animation thread to fully exit. void splash_set_update_notification (const char *notification)
Set update notification to display on splash/status screens.

Detailed Description

Intro and status screen display implementation with animated rainbow effects.

Implements splash screen functionality including:

  • TTY detection with stdin/stdout checks
  • Animated rainbow color generation and cycling
  • UTF-8 box drawing character support with ASCII fallback
  • Non-blocking animation that runs while app initializes
  • Clean integration with main frame rendering

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

February 2026
